Wiliot's ambient IoT sensing platform — batteryless tags that harvest energy from the environment — is a genuinely novel approach to the connectivity problem for billions of everyday objects.

I lead an embedded and IoT engineering team specializing in ultra-low-power embedded firmware for energy-harvesting IoT devices, BLE advertising and ambient backscatter protocol implementation, cloud IoT platform integration (AWS IoT, Azure IoT Hub), sensor data processing and edge analytics firmware, and supply chain and cold chain IoT application development.

If Wiliot has firmware or IoT platform engineering capacity needs, I'd welcome a conversation.

Best,
Moiz Ahmad
IoT & Embedded Systems Lead
moizahmad1604@gmail.com
